sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58193" key="knipo/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κνῑπ-όομαι</orth>, of the eyes, <sense id="n58193.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be inflamed</tr_>, Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κεκνιπωμένοι</foreign>; of fruits, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be mildewed</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
